detail: Kirkland & Ellis LLP classified as advisor (law firm) although retained by bidder Thoma Bravo, not target; included as advisor per law-firm-in-process convention
Chip Linnemann classified as advisor (consultant to Company); retained by target to assist Special Committee
7 NDAs = 3 strategic + 4 financial; 6 attended management presentation (7 minus 1 financial sponsor that declined post-NDA)
Filing says 'early 2015 and again in June 2015' for Thoma Bravo meetings; recorded as 2015-06-15 with date_precision=approximate
Filing says 'January 2016' for Thoma Bravo industry conference meeting; recorded as 2016-01-15 with date_precision=approximate
NDA dates for Strategic 1, 2, 3 and Sponsor A, B (imp_e08-imp_e12) not stated; executed during May 6-June 9 period; recorded as 2016-05-15 with date_precision=approximate
Unnamed financial sponsor NDA (imp_e13) and dropout (imp_e25) dates not stated; 'shortly after executing confidentiality agreement'; recorded as 2016-05-15 with date_precision=approximate
Sponsor A indicated would not meaningfully improve bid; Barclays said no further discussions. No explicit withdrawal statement. Inferred drop on June 15, 2016.
Sponsor B indicated final bid would be significantly below June 9 bid; Barclays said no further discussions. No explicit withdrawal statement. Inferred drop on June 29, 2016.
imp_parties_contacted_1: expected 15, extracted 8; gap of 7 explained by unnamed_aggregate (strategic parties contacted but declined before NDA, not individually identified)
imp_bidders_invited_1: expected 15, extracted 8; gap of 7 explained by unnamed_aggregate (strategic parties on indicative list declined before NDA, not individually named in narrative)
Single cycle: no terminated or restarted events in events.jsonl. Cycle spans imp_e01 (bidder_interest 2015-06) through imp_e30 (executed 2016-07-13).

imp_e18: filing_language contains 'preliminary non-binding indication of interest' (Rule 3 informal) but evidence_attributes.accompanied_by_merger_agreement is true (Rule 2 formal). Rule 2 takes priority per classification-rules.md; classified as formal.
